code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut max_opt: Option<Int> = None
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut val = 0
mut started = false

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_space
    if in_num and started
      let num = sign * val
      if num > 0
        match max_opt
        when Some(m)
          if num > m
            max_opt = Some(num)
          end
        when None
          max_opt = Some(num)
        end
      end
    end
    in_num = false
    sign = 1
    val = 0
    started = false
  else
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
      val = 0
      started = false
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
      else if b == 43
        sign = 1
      else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        val = b - 48
        started = true
      end
    else
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        started = true
      end
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

match max_opt
when Some(m)
  print("max=#{m}")
when None
  print("none")
end
